title: Visual KB and Silktouch
description: A texture pack that allows you to see if your sword has knockback and if your pickaxe has silktouch
body:
A helpful texture pack that allows you to see if your sword has knockback 1 (in red) or knockback 2 (in green) and also if your pickaxe has silktouch (also in green).

This can be useful for being aware 24/7 which one of your swords has knockback and if youre mining your ender chest with the right pickaxe.
